title: Integration Monitoring Dashboard Auto-Refresh at Configurable Interval
description: The Integration Monitoring dashboard shall automatically refresh monitoring data at a configurable interval.
recommendedTechnicalApproach: setInterval() polling GET /api/integrations/monitoring. No WebSockets needed for MVP. SSE or WebSockets only if real-time per-transaction streaming is required.

dashboardLayout.header: Last updated: 10:32:14 AM | Auto-refresh: 10 sec ● | [↻ Refresh Now]
dashboardLayout.statusCards: One card per carrier integration showing status, record count, error count

title: Default Monitoring Refresh Interval — 10 Seconds
description: The default monitoring refresh interval shall be 10 seconds.

title: Manual Refresh Now Action
description: The dashboard shall provide a manual [↻ Refresh Now] action. Clicking it shall immediately trigger a data refresh and reset the polling timer.

title: Display Timestamp of Last Successful Data Refresh
description: The dashboard shall display the timestamp of the last successful data refresh. If refresh fails, retain last good data and indicate it may be stale.
staleDataDisplay: ⚠ Unable to refresh | Last successful update: 10:31:42 AM | [Retry]

title: Visual In-Progress State for Actively Processing Carrier Transmissions
description: The system shall display a visual in-progress state for carrier transmissions that are actively processing. The display shall include record counts and elapsed time.
demoSimulationNote: For demo: advance 500 records every 2 seconds to create visible operational progress. Use deterministic simulation, not random.

title: Processing Progress Using Processed Records and Total Records
description: The system shall display processing progress using processed records and total records where available. Do not use a fake percentage.

title: Standardized Integration Status Values
description: The system shall support standardized integration statuses with distinct visual indicators.

title: Aggregate Integration Metrics — Records, Errors, Status Per Integration
description: The system shall display aggregate integration metrics including total records, successful records, failed records, and processing status for each integration.

title: Drill Down from Aggregate Integration Results to Individual Transactions
description: Users shall be able to drill down from aggregate integration results to individual transaction records. Clicking on a carrier's error count opens the transaction-level error detail.

title: Retry Failed Transactions
description: Users shall be able to retry failed transactions where supported. A [Retry N Failed Transactions] action shall be available on partial-failure integrations.

title: Pause Polling When Browser Tab Inactive, Resume on Tab Active
description: The system shall pause automatic polling when the monitoring browser tab is inactive and perform an immediate refresh when the tab becomes active.
pollingLogic: Dashboard opens → Initial API call → Start 10-second polling
Tab active → Immediate refresh → Resume 10-sec polling

title: Prevent Overlapping Monitoring Polling Requests
description: The system shall prevent overlapping monitoring polling requests. If a polling request is still in flight when the next interval fires, skip the duplicate request.

title: Retain Last Good Data and Flag Staleness When Monitoring Refresh Fails
description: If a monitoring refresh fails, the system shall retain the last successfully retrieved data and clearly indicate that the displayed data may be stale.

title: Deterministic Carrier Response Simulations for Demo
description: The demo environment shall support deterministic carrier response simulations including full success, partial failure, and full rejection. The simulation mode shall be configurable rather than random.
